title: hieracium calcareum subsp. papperitzii
intro: Hieracium calcareum subsp. papperitzii, also known as a type of hawkweed, is a plant species in the dandelion family (Asteraceae) that is native to the mountainous regions of Europe. The medicinal properties of Hieracium calcareum subsp. papperitzii include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which are believed to contribute to its potential health benefits. Some of the reported health benefits of this plant include its ability to support liver function and act as an antioxidant, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy. Hieracium calcareum subsp. papperitzii can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infused oil, although its preparations and uses should be approached with caution due to its potential toxicity.
